title: print job model
text: print job model A definition of how and where a Uniface form or report is to be printed, including details of the device type, margins, and so on. Related Links Print Job Models A print job model is a named collection of printer attributes that determine how and where Uniface forms or reports are printed, including details of the device type, margins, and so on. A print job model must be available before you can print. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
